CREATE TABLE text_samples (id UInt32, sample String);
INSERT INTO text_samples VALUES (1, 'こんにちは');
INSERT INTO text_samples VALUES (4, 'Bonjour tout le monde');
SELECT detectCharset(sample) FROM text_samples WHERE id = 1;
SELECT detectCharset(sample) FROM (SELECT sample FROM text_samples WHERE id > 1) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE charset_results (id UInt32, charset String);
INSERT INTO charset_results SELECT id, detectCharset(sample) FROM text_samples;
SELECT r.id, r.charset FROM charset_results AS r JOIN text_samples AS t ON r.id = t.id WHERE r.charset IS NOT NULL;
SELECT detectCharset(CONCAT(sample, ' additional text')) FROM text_samples WHERE id = 2;
SELECT detectCharset(sample) FROM text_samples WHERE sample LIKE 'H%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM text_samples WHERE detectCharset(sample) = 'UTF-8';
SELECT detectCharset((SELECT sample FROM text_samples WHERE id = 3 LIMIT 1)) AS charset_sample;
